data.title: Today, the Bitcoin ETF saw a net outflow of 3,826 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF saw a net outflow of 58,467 ETH.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, the Bitcoin ETF saw a net outflow of 3,826 BTC today, and a net outflow of 183 BTC over the past 7 days; the Ethereum ETF saw a net outflow of 58,467 ETH, and a net inflow of 342,134 ETH over the past 7 days; the Solana ETF saw a net inflow of 67,125 SOL, and a net inflow of 342,134 SOL over the past 7 days.

data.title: a16z Crypto advises crypto developers: Over-reliance on trading platforms could weaken long-term competitiveness.
data.description: a16z Crypto officially released advice from two of its executives to cryptocurrency developers. Specifically: 1. Arianna Simpson, General Partner at a16z Crypto, stated that currently, aside from stablecoins and core infrastructure, most well-performing crypto companies are transitioning to trading platforms. This homogeneous competition will weaken market attention for most companies, with only a few winners emerging. Founders who rush into trading may miss the opportunity to build more defensive and sustainable businesses. Developers who focus on the product itself rather than simple trading functionality are likely to be the bigger winners. 2. Miles Jennings, from a16z Crypto's policy team and General Counsel, stated that developers should focus on regulatory compliance. The Trump administration is closer than ever to passing a regulatory bill for the crypto market structure. If passed, this legislation will incentivize transparency and establish clear standards, creating a clear path for fundraising, token issuance, and decentralization.

data.title: CryptoQuant: Large Bitcoin Investor Holdings See Fastest Decline Since Early 2023
data.description: CryptoQuant, using on-chain data, points out that addresses holding between 1,000 and 10,000 BTC have seen a year-over-year decrease of 220,000 BTC, the fastest decline since early 2023. Historical data shows a similar pattern occurred in 2021-2022, before prices peaked.

data.title: BitMEX report highlights structural shifts in crypto perpetual swaps market in 2025
data.description:
The crypto perpetual swaps market faced its most significant stress test to date in 2025, according to BitMEX’s State of Crypto Perpetual Swaps 2025 report. Long viewed as a core source of liquidity and yield, perpetual futures instead became a focal point for systemic failures, collapsing funding rates, and renewed questions around exchange practices. The report examines how a year marked by liquidation cascades, exchange disruptions, and structural changes reshaped derivative trading across both centralized and decentralized platforms. October ADL crisis exposes market structure weaknesses According to the report, the defining event of 2025 occurred during the October 10–11 market crash, which triggered an estimated $20 billion liquidation cascade, the largest in crypto history
source: https://finbold.com/bitmex-report-highlights-structural-shifts-in-crypto-perpetual-swaps-market-in-2025/

data.title: Trump released the jobs data 12 hours early, and it matched the official results precisely.
data.description: Trump posted a chart on social media Thursday evening that included the yet-to-be-released December jobs report. The chart showed that the private sector added 654,000 jobs since January, a figure consistent with the official data to be released later that evening. The post was published approximately 12 hours before the scheduled data release. The president typically receives a briefing the day before the data is released. (Jinshi)

data.title: White House economic advisor Hassett: The Federal Reserve needs to cut interest rates further.
data.description: White House economic advisor Hassett stated that the Federal Reserve needs to further cut interest rates and has very detailed contingency plans regarding tariffs. (Jinshi)

data.title: South Korea Moves Toward Spot Bitcoin ETFs in 2026 Strategy
data.description:
South Korea is preparing to open its market to spot Bitcoin exchange-traded funds this year as part of a broader effort to support economic growth and modernize its financial system. While regulatory and legal work is still underway, officials have signaled that the direction is now firmly set.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/south-korea-moves-toward-spot-bitcoin-etfs-in-2026-strategy/

data.title: White House Economic Advisor Calls for Further Fed Rate Cuts
data.description: According to Odaily, White House Economic Advisor Kevin Hassett has stated that the Federal Reserve needs to implement further interest rate cuts. He also mentioned that there is a comprehensive backup plan regarding tariffs.

data.title: Coinbase Markets Year-End Review: 110 Crypto Assets and 100 Perpetual Contracts Launched by 2025
data.description: Coinbase Markets released its 2025 review, revealing that it launched 110 new crypto assets last year, bringing the total number of tradable crypto assets to over 350. The platform also launched 100 perpetual contracts, bringing the total number of tradable perpetual contracts to 199. Coinbase Markets stated that 2025 was a significant turning point for Coinbase derivatives, introducing 24/7 trading. Perpetual futures open interest surpassed $1 billion in June, and the platform's total open interest for perpetual and futures contracts reached a peak of $4.8 billion in October. In 2026, the platform plans to further expand its product portfolio with new indices, stocks, and emerging assets.

data.title: Fed mouthpiece: Non-farm payroll report provides ample reason for Fed to hold rates steady this month
data.description: Nick Timiraos, often referred to as the "Federal Reserve mouthpiece," recently wrote: "Tonight's December jobs report provides ample reason for Fed officials to remain on the sidelines at this month's meeting. Nonfarm payrolls increased by only 50,000, and the three-month average of private sector hiring fell to 29,000, the second-lowest growth rate of the year. This sluggish pace of job growth underscores the dynamic of a 'slow hiring, slow laying off' labor market in 2025. However, the decline in the unemployment rate has temporarily eased extreme concerns about a deteriorating labor market. It is precisely these concerns that have prompted the Fed to cut interest rates in the last three meetings. This report reinforces market expectations that the Fed will hold rates steady at its January 27-28 meeting, but the weak hiring data also ensures that the debate about the health of the labor market is far from over." (Jinshi)

data.title: South Korea to Allow Spot Bitcoin ETFs in 2026 Growth Plan
data.description:
South Korea's 2026 Economic Growth Strategy includes spot Bitcoin ETF introduction following active trading in US and Hong Kong markets, while phase-two digital asset legislation establishing stablecoin regulatory frameworks remains stalled over governance disputes as authorities impose ₩27. 3 billion Korbit fine and prepare 24-hour forex trading expansion starting July.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/south-korea-to-allow-spot-bitcoin-etfs-in-2026-growth-plan/
